title: Garden Route E-Voting event in George
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Electoral Commission...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Electoral Commission of South Africa in the Western Cape is embarking on a process of promoting and advancing public policy debate on electronic voting (E-Voting) technologies and the possibility of introducing such technologies in South Africa.


> The public debates and engagements that the commission intends to lead will inform attendees regarding a variety of aspects of e-voting, including benefits, challenges, risks and security related to the technology.


Residents of the Garden Route region are invited to attend the engagement in George.

Details:

- What: E-Voting Consultation
- When: 29 September
- Where: George Community Hall (Banqueting)
- Time: 11:00 to 14:00

Comments regarding E-Voting can be submitted on email to [email protected].

Postal Address: Electoral Commission of South Africa, Private Bag X112, Centurion, 0046

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
